intentSynonyms: respond a to event in outlook
accept, decline, or tentatively accept in outlook
description: Respond to a meeting invitation by accepting, declining, or tentatively accepting. Optionally include a comment and choose whether to send a response back to the organizer.

event_id.description: The event ID of the meeting invitation

comment.description: Optional comment to include with the response

send_response.description: Whether to send the response to the organizer (default: true)
